description.canonicalText: 象徵勇猛的耳環。

description.canonicalText: 登峰絕頂的耳環。

setRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal EquipmentSet identity is not established.

description.canonicalText: 冰之女王所佩戴耳環的雛形，蘊藏成長的可能。可在歐瑞村 大衛 處以 冰之結晶 逐級精煉。（裝於耳環欄）

description.canonicalText: 賽菲亞祝福的輕盈長靴，使妖精的步伐如風、箭矢更準。

mechanicRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal Mechanic identity is not established.

setRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal EquipmentSet identity is not established.

skillRefs.unresolvedReason: No verified direct Skill relation is established for this Equipment record.

description.canonicalText: 以炎魔鮮血浸染而成的斗篷，纏身時身影隱沒於灼熱的暗影裡。穿戴時等同維持隱身（卸下即失效）。

mechanicRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal Mechanic identity is not established.

setRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal EquipmentSet identity is not established.

description.canonicalText: 惡魔套裝之一。

setRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal EquipmentSet identity is not established.

description.canonicalText: 自木乃伊王枯朽的頭顱上取下的黃金王冠，千年塵封下金光依舊。

mechanicRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal Mechanic identity is not established.

setRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal EquipmentSet identity is not established.

skillRefs.unresolvedReason: No verified direct Skill relation is established for this Equipment record.

description.canonicalText: 胸口鑄有十字徽記的重護甲。

mechanicRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal Mechanic identity is not established.

setRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal EquipmentSet identity is not established.

skillRefs.unresolvedReason: No verified direct Skill relation is established for this Equipment record.

description.canonicalText: 銘刻無數勝戰的榮耀之牙，激起寵物的鬥志。

mechanicRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal Mechanic identity is not established.

setRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal EquipmentSet identity is not established.

skillRefs.unresolvedReason: No verified direct Skill relation is established for this Equipment record.

description.canonicalText: 【遺物】上古巨蜘蛛蛻下的尖爪，磨作單手劍鋒利無匹。

mechanicRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal Mechanic identity is not established.

setRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal EquipmentSet identity is not established.

skillRefs.unresolvedReason: No verified direct Skill relation is established for this Equipment record.

description.canonicalText: 【遺物】熊吃剩後掛在耳邊的魚骨，硌得人動作遲鈍。

mechanicRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal Mechanic identity is not established.

setRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal EquipmentSet identity is not established.

skillRefs.unresolvedReason: No verified direct Skill relation is established for this Equipment record.

description.canonicalText: 【遺物】骷髏弓箭手身上抽出的柔韌肋骨，揮舞如刃、格擋如盾。

mechanicRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal Mechanic identity is not established.

description.canonicalText: 【遺物】火焰環繞不息的腰帶，膽敢近身者反遭烈焰灼身。

mechanicRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal Mechanic identity is not established.

setRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal EquipmentSet identity is not established.

skillRefs.unresolvedReason: No verified direct Skill relation is established for this Equipment record.

description.canonicalText: 【遺物】以整條狐尾織成的華貴圍巾，軟毛間流轉抗魔的靈氣。

mechanicRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal Mechanic identity is not established.

setRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal EquipmentSet identity is not established.

skillRefs.unresolvedReason: No verified direct Skill relation is established for this Equipment record.

description.canonicalText: 【遺物】格利芬鋒利的巨爪，撕裂空氣的速度快得肉眼難辨。雙手鋼爪。

mechanicRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal Mechanic identity is not established.

setRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal EquipmentSet identity is not established.

skillRefs.unresolvedReason: No verified direct Skill relation is established for this Equipment record.

description.canonicalText: 【遺物】從巨大蘑菇摘下的傘帽，戴上竟能抵禦魔法。

mechanicRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal Mechanic identity is not established.

setRefs.unresolvedReason: Formal EquipmentSet identity is not established.

skillRefs.unresolvedReason: No verified direct Skill relation is established for this Equipment record.

description.canonicalText: 【遺物】食人妖精王套在獸群頸上的尖刺項圈，號令群獸為其效死。

records.displayName: 食人妖精王的尖刺項圈

description.canonicalText: 【遺物】妖魔廚房裡鏽蝕的老菜刀，刀身沾染大地的濁氣。

description.canonicalText: 【遺物】變形怪擬態而成的透明內衣，隨主人潛能起伏。

description.canonicalText: 【遺物】薩德司卡剝落的石護臂，堅厚護體。臂甲（裝於副手，可與雙手武器並用）。

description.canonicalText: 【遺物】思克巴女皇的魅惑之衣，使攻擊者反受其害。

description.canonicalText: 由魔物殘骸之力凝鑄的斧頭，揮砍間透著一股戾氣。單手鈍器（鈍擊）。

description.canonicalText: 象徵騎士榮耀的單手劍，反擊來犯之敵。
